name: Qwen2.5-VL
tagline: VL models at 3B/7B/32B/72B with stronger document parsing, grounding and long-video understanding.
metaDescription: Qwen2.5-VL (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-01 — part of the Qwen-VL line. VL models at 3B/7B/32B/72B with stronger document parsing, grounding and long-video u…
overview: Qwen2.5-VL is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-VL line. Released 2025-01. Vision-language models that read images, documents, charts and video and (from Qwen3-VL) act as visual agents.
What's notable in this version: VL models at 3B/7B/32B/72B with stronger document parsing, grounding and long-video understanding.
